title: Bold and others shortcuts
excerpt:
I use a french version of Windows. 
Shortcuts in France are localised. To make bold on a text, we use CTRL + G shortcut. 
Shortcuts in Monday are based on english langage (CTRL + B)

posts.author: Franck (Covens)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use a french version of Windows.
Shortcuts in France are localised. To make bold on a text, we use CTRL + G shortcut.
Shortcuts in Monday are based on english langage (CTRL + B)

You must adjust the shortcuts to match country uses.
